title: Squid Doors
body:
# Squid Doors

### Requires **GeckoLib**

This mod adds 4 types of doors:
- Elevator door:
   ![Elevator door](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00a9e7fa8f1acf4e7338063646236973b0244062.png)

- Metal door:
   ![Metal door](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4436e6993b4ddd1ea529ccc3654f633ef58448f6.png)

- Main door:
   ![Main door](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91330ef2f210b01db474ec5247b68b6f5e9ddea3.png)

- Doll door:
   ![Doll door](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d61511f923763bc3981d94d1b7d6d7da7f34f35.png)

These doors have animations when they are opened and closed.

You can use the data command with merge like this:

- ```/data merge ENTITYID {ForgeData:{close:1b}}```
- ```/data merge ENTITYID {ForgeData:{open:1b}}```


Or use the door lock / unlock items:
![Door lock / unclocki items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/565d44db25cb155112e38f63727f35026d77cbf1.png)

Before use of any of the door please use the door rotator item to align the door in a proper position: ![Door rotator item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67131e4163e32339ea29d2dddc6f915fd9e962a2.png)

Disclaimer: This mod is intended only for administrator use. Every door requires admin permission to execute the command or the creative items for that.

## Credits:
- [L0LAME Studio](https://discord.gg/l0lame-studio-1119920045598969898) for providing the assets required for the doors.
